response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure experience with relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools. While his background includes leadership and technical depth, his direct experience with production-grade GenAI solutions and RAG architectures is less explicitly detailed, warranting further exploration in an interview.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes).
Proven leadership in technical roles, including mentorship and cross-functional collaboration (e.g., at re:cinq and Altom Consulting).
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP code generators.
concerns: Limited explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI/GenAI solutions (focus appears more on traditional software development).
No direct mention of vector databases or RAG architectures in resume, despite their criticality to the role.
Geographic and industry context (India-based roles) may not fully align with enterprise GenAI delivery for Western markets.
